name: Haunted Armory & Treasures — 26 Weapons, Armor & Magic Items | 16×16 Pixel Art
description:
**⚔️ 26 METICULOUSLY CRAFTED LOOT SPRITES — Weapons, Armor, Magic & Rare Treasures! ⚔️**

Make finding loot feel **rewarding**! This pack covers everything from humble daggers to legendary crowns and dragon eggs. Perfect for RPG inventory systems, shop menus, loot drops, and crafting tables. **All sprites CC0 licensed!**

---

**📦 WHAT'S INSIDE:**

**⚔️ Weapons (8)**
Dagger, spear, mace, battle axe, longbow, wizard staff, flame sword (enchanted!), magic wand

**🛡️ Armor & Gear (5)**
Iron helmet, steel gauntlets, armored boots, basic shield, quiver of arrows

**🔮 Magic Items (7)**
Enchanted amulet, mystic orb, magic ring, glowing crystal, ancient tome, phoenix feather, star charm

**💎 Treasures & Valuables (6)**
Royal crown, jeweled crown, golden chalice, treasure pile (coins!), skull relic, dragon egg, rainbow potion

---

**✅ ALL SPRITES:**
- 26 unique sprites (16×16 pixels)
- Perfect size for inventory grids and equipment slots
- Transparent PNGs — drag & drop into any engine
- **CC0 LICENSE — commercial use, no credit required!**

**🎨 STYLE:** 0x72 Dungeon Tileset inspired with consistent Haunted palette
**🏆 Curator Score: 8.3/10 — Approved with Distinction!**

**💀 Perfect for:** RPGs, roguelikes, shop UIs, crafting systems, loot tables, game jams, and any game with a rewarding loot economy!
